sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, haystack String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'hello world'), (2, 'fuzzy logic'), (3, 'clickhouse database');
SELECT id, multiFuzzyMatchAllIndices(haystack, 1, ['hello', 'fuzzy']) as match_indices FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET haystack = 'fuzzy matching' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, multiFuzzyMatchAllIndices(haystack, 2, ['world', 'database']) as match_indices FROM test_strings;
